title: Hooks & Lifecycle
description: Agent extensibility via lifecycle hooks — intercept, observe, and control agent behavior at key points in the workflow

features.title: Pre-tool-use hook
features.description: Run custom code before any tool executes
sub_capabilities: Tool-specific filtering via matchers (Claude Code: match by tool name or regex; Codex: shell-only initially, MCP tool observation added in 0.124.0)
Blocking via exit code to veto the tool call (both agents)

features.title: Post-tool-use hook
features.description: Run custom code after a tool completes
sub_capabilities: Tool-specific filtering via matchers (Claude Code: match by tool name or regex; Codex: shell-only initially)
Useful for post-edit linting, formatting, or logging

features.title: User prompt submit hook
features.description: Intercept or augment user prompts before they are processed
sub_capabilities: Can block or modify the prompt before the agent sees it
Useful for injecting context, enforcing policies, or prompt logging

features.title: Turn-end / stop hook
features.description: Fire a hook when the agent finishes a turn, with the ability to continue
sub_capabilities: Can force the agent to continue working by returning a non-zero exit code (Claude Code)
Useful for quality gates, automated review, or chaining tasks

features.title: Notification hook
features.description: Fire a hook on general system notifications such as errors or status updates
sub_capabilities: Covers error events, status changes, and general agent notifications
Useful for external logging, alerting, or observability integrations

features.title: Subagent completion hook
features.description: Fire a hook when a subagent completes its work
sub_capabilities: Receives subagent result context on stdin
Useful for aggregating subagent outputs or enforcing policies on delegated work

features.title: Session start hook
features.description: Fire a hook when an agent session begins
sub_capabilities: Useful for initializing environment, loading context, or session logging

features.title: Permission request hook
features.description: Hook into the permission/approval flow to auto-allow, deny, or defer
sub_capabilities: Allows programmatic approval or denial of tool execution requests

features.title: Blocking hooks
features.description: Pre-hooks can block the pending action via exit code or return value
sub_capabilities: Claude Code: exit code 2 blocks the action; exit code 0 allows
Codex: similar exit-code-based blocking

features.title: Event matchers / filters
features.description: Scope a hook to specific tools or events by name or pattern
sub_capabilities: Claude Code: tool_name field matches by exact name or regex
Codex: matcher patterns for filtering tool events

features.title: Structured I/O protocol
features.description: Hooks receive context as JSON on stdin and can return structured output on stdout
sub_capabilities: Input includes tool name, arguments, and session context
Output can modify tool arguments or provide decisions (block/allow)

features.title: Configurable timeout
features.description: Per-hook timeout setting to prevent runaway hooks

features.title: Project-level hooks
features.description: Hooks configured at the project/repo level, shareable via version control

features.title: User-level hooks
features.description: Hooks configured globally for the current user across all projects
